content: Use Storybloq for ticket state, lessons, issues, and handovers, but implement tickets directly by default. Run full multi-lens review only for high-risk work touching auth, payments, PHI/privacy/compliance, Stripe/MDI webhooks or intake, DynamoDB schema/idempotency/concurrency, infrastructure, secrets, or deployment security. After a revise verdict, batch fixes and re-review only the categories touched by the fixes or any critical/high findings; approve or defer once high-risk findings are addressed and verification passes.
context: Added after T-045 autonomous work produced many full multi-lens review rounds. The rounds found real security/reliability issues, but the repeated full-review loop was token-intensive. `.story/config.json` now defaults reviewBackends to `agent`; lenses remain available for explicit risk-gated use.
title: Use risk-gated review loops after first full review
